economic_notes: Operates Crow Lake Gas & Convenience Ltd., Economic Development Inc., Economic Development Limited Partnership. Equity method entities: Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to: (1) no budget comparison presented as required by PSAS, and (2) possible incomplete identification of Asset Retirement Obligation liabilities under PS 3280 adopted April 1, 2022. Timber claim settlement of $21,112,491 is a large non-recurring item. Two entities (Kakagi Lake Enterprises LP and 1833389 Ontario Inc.) accounted for by modified equity method and not fully consolidated. Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 but auditor's report is dated July 31, 2024. total_government_transfers includes ISC ($7,477,836) + ISC Health Canada ($4,489,695) + Province of Ontario ($2,528,003) + CMHC ($424,929) + Grand Council Treaty 3 ($1,236,890) + Weechi-it-te-win ($504,452) + Shooniyaa ($242073) = $16,903,878 approximate; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
